title: Tram pack Standard Edition [IR - Immersive railroading]
description: Resource pack with trams for Immersive Railroading mod.
body:
**Immersive railroading v1.9.1 and older and all test-builds are no longer supported! Please download latest IR and UMC releases from CurseForge.**

Tram pack is a resource pack for [Immersive railroading](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-railroading) mod that adds various trams, tram tracks and tram catenary.

The pack is often updated and supplemented by new models of the rolling stock.

Installation: drop the archive into a folder "resourcepacks" or "config">"immersiverailroading".

![Depot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bEjdyppz/images/ccdae3020e0eb284d3495906ca2d012296527351.png)

Models have different features. Working lights and other lighting equipment. Fully working doors, windows and other mechanization. Almost fully interactive dashboard and interior. Possibility to sit on seats. And much more.  

![T4SU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bEjdyppz/images/3d8d99098f65445aaa4d19ad067d7c82838cbdc6.png)
![Electron T5L64](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bEjdyppz/images/0a51d4285dfd4f0bce6b316c294e8fc035a01156.png)

Also variety of different tram lines. You can make your own tram system.

![KT8D5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bEjdyppz/images/779bfd44ab09e1f31151ddc0b9dd20ce1861be18.png)

Not only passanger rolling stock.

![SKh-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bEjdyppz/images/71092c4155697af54810c586f908c44575ad65af.png)

If you have any questions you can ask them on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/9jT7f4n2aT).

If you like my work, then you can support me with your donation! Thank you!
